Module 1: Role Definition  
The department of energy has been at the forefront of renewable energy research, focusing on sustainable solutions to meet global energy demands.  

Module 2: Constraints  
All sentences must be connected using hyphens, with no spaces between them. The keyword routine must be included.  

Module 3: Output Format  
The response must be divided into exactly four independent modules. Each module must be clearly labeled and formatted as specified.  

Module 4: Error Prevention  
Avoid overcomplicating, check for consistency, and ensure all requirements are addressed in the final response.
